title: Oil prices top $100 as Middle East tensions escalate, global stocks plunge
body: WTI crude surpassed $100 per barrel on fears of a Strait of Hormuz blockade. The Dow Jones tumbled 557 points as geopolitical risks weigh heavily on markets.

title: S&P 500 surges 10.49% in April on Big Tech earnings — but valuation risk flashes a warning
body: The S&P 500 posted its best monthly gain since 2020 with a 10.49% rise in April. Q1 earnings grew 27.1%, yet a forward P/E of 24x is raising valuation concerns.

title: Powell exit, Warsh nomination imminent — hawkish shift raises year-end rate hike odds
body: Monetary policy uncertainty is growing as Fed Chair Powell nears the end of his term and Kevin Warsh's hawkish stance comes into focus. Fears of re-accelerating inflation are putting rate hikes back on the table.
